meaning: adj.变故多的,重要的,多事的,多事的,充满大事的
examples: This has been an eventful year for Tom, both professionally and personally.
Of the kind which Pinocchio had on that eventful morning of his life, there are but few.
This year is eventful for China.
It was an eventful morning in Western Australia as home star Chris Atkinson crashed on the sixth stage.
"I think it's been a more eventful few weeks for the media, " Smith said.
